PRO TEMP JAMES MILLAR, P.DOWLING/CSR, K.LEE/CLERK 03:00PM CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ARNOLD EVJE FOR THE PLTF AND THE DEFT ELYSE FARBER IN PRO PER. CASE IS SETTLED. THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BACK, LAWRENCE FARBER, ELYSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2766 MISSION STREET #8, SAN FRANCISCO, STAYED UNTIL MAR-04-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, AT 5:00PM. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE ON TIME, THEN PLTF TO HAVE AN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR UNPAID BACK RENT OF $ 1,200 AND U.D. DAMAGES OF $ 13.33 PER DAY FROM FEB 1, 1997 TO MARCH 4, 1997 AND COSTS OF $ 83.OO FOR A TOTAL AMENDED JUDGMENT OF $ 1,709.56. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
